info.name: LinkBoard
info.summary: Personal service dashboard inspired by Gethomepage
info.description:
**LinkBoard** – A beautiful, customizable service dashboard for your homelab.
Organize your services in categories, monitor their status, and access everything from within Nextcloud.
### Features - 🏠 Personal dashboard with service tiles grouped by category - 🎨 Dark/Light mode with customizable backgrounds - 🖼️ Flexible icon system (upload, URL, Material Design Icons) - 📋 YAML & JSON import/export (Gethomepage compatible) - 🔍 Quick search across all services - 📂 Nested categories with drag & drop grouping - ✏️ Inline editing with drag & drop sorting - 🩺 Service health checks with status indicators - 📊 Widget system for live data from external APIs
Each user gets their own personal dashboard – up to 500 services.
info.author: Andreas Busslinger
